Translation.Description: Legendary gladiator Black Spike was said to be invincible in the arena, piling up victories and corpses, slaying champions and monsters alike with tireless and relentless determination. His shield was crafted by a renowned master smith who happened to be one of his greatest admirers. So sharp are its spokes that a casual touch might lead to a disabling injury.
Translation.Provides: Lacerating Spokes - Enemies that strike the wearer take 2-5 damage
Shield Slam - Knocks victims back a tile and knocks them prone
Collect three Black Spike items to inflict Dismantling Stroke- +400% Crushing Blow Attack
